name: GOUKEN OUGI: OMOTE RENGE (IRON FIST SECRET SKILL: INITIAL LOTUS)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 6

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: Mob

This technique must be used after successfully knocking a target into the air with Kage Buyou. Make an unarmed attack against the target, which gains a critical threat range increase of +1 and deals triple damage on hit. If hit, the target is stunned for 1d6 rounds (Fortitude negates), is thrown down to the ground and knocked prone, and may not make a Tumble check to reduce or avoid fall damage.

You will land in a square adjacent to the target, and will become exhausted for the remainder of the encounter, plus 5 minutes afterwards. A Fortitude save (DC 21) allows you to be fatigued instead.
